allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Findings:'''', sum\(x[''''finding_count''''] for x in d[''''dimensions'''']\)\); [print\(f[''''id''''], f[''''severity''''], f[''''summary'''']\) for f in d.get\(''''findings'''',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); findings=[f for f in data[''''findings''''] if f[''''severity''''] in \(''''Critical'''',''''Warning''''\)]; print\(f''''Total: {len\(findings\)}''''\); [print\(f""  {f[''''id'''']} [{f[''''severity'''']}]: {f[''''summary''''][:80]}""\) for f in findings]")
